query:
SELECT 
  DATE(pt.paid_at) as paid_date,
  SUM(pt.amount) as device_sale_sum,
  COUNT(*) as row_count
FROM payment_transactions pt
INNER JOIN contracts c ON c.contract_no = pt.contract_no AND c.section = pt.section
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT pt2.contract_no, pt2.section, DATE(MAX(pt2.paid_at)) as last_paid_date
  FROM payment_transactions pt2
  INNER JOIN contracts c2 ON c2.contract_no = pt2.contract_no AND c2.section = pt2.section
  WHERE c2.status = 'หนี้เสีย'
    AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt2.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  GROUP BY pt2.contract_no, pt2.section
) last_pay ON last_pay.contract_no = pt.contract_no 
          AND last_pay.section = pt.section
          AND DATE(pt.paid_at) = last_pay.last_paid_date
WHERE c.status = 'หนี้เสีย'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND SUBSTRING(pt.paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
GROUP BY DATE(pt.paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date;

FROM payment_transactions pt
INNER JOIN contracts c ON c.contract_no = pt.contract_no AND c.section = pt.section
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT pt2.contract_no, pt2.section, DATE(MAX(pt2.paid_at)) as last_paid_date
  FROM payment_transactions pt2
  INNER JOIN contracts c2 ON c2.contract_no = pt2.contract_no AND c2.section = pt2.section
  WHERE c2.status = 'หนี้เสีย'
    AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt2.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  GROUP BY pt2.contract_no, pt2.section
) last_pay ON last_pay.contract_no = pt.contract_no 
          AND last_pay.section = pt.section
          AND DATE(pt.paid_at) = last_pay.last_paid_date
WHERE c.status = 'หนี้เสีย'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND SUBSTRING(pt.paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
GROUP BY DATE(pt.paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date;
